news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
Countries beating the coronavirus are getting 'rewarded' in the stock market, ETF analysts say

holdings.infoBox: CNXT is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Other/Cash stock at 14.09%, Zhongji Innolight at 11.16%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 10.68%, -USD CASH- at 7.56%, and Eoptolink Technology Inc. at 6.97%.

overview.description: The VanEck ChiNext Innovators ETF (CNXT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ChiNext - CNY index. The fund tracks a cap-weighted index of 100 small- and medium-size companies traded on the SME Board and ChiNext Board of the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. CNXT was launched on Jul 23, 2014 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Countries beating the coronavirus are getting 'rewarded' in the stock market, ETF analysts say
data.text: Some European and Chinese ETFs have been outperforming as the underlying countries get the coronavirus under control, analysts say.

data.title: Cannabis, China and cancer treatment: These are 2019's best performing ETFs
data.text: The top performing ETFs so far in 2019 hit on three major themes: China, cannabis and genomics. Bob Pisani breaks down the trend with CFRA's Todd Rosenbluth and Astoria Advisors' John Davi.
